message:
Improve llms.txt plugin with directory expansion and Symbol label filtering (#173)

* Configure task list ID for Claude Code integration

This environment variable enables Claude Code task tracking integration for
the documentation project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Improve llms.txt plugin with directory expansion and Symbol label filtering

- Skip API sidebar items with Symbol-prefixed labels from starlight-openapi
- Expand reference/operators, reference/functions, and reference/claude-plugins to list all child pages
- Add child page hierarchy to individual per-page markdown files
- Add optional sitemapAlias config to create sitemap.md alias for llms.txt
- Remove redundant llms-custom.txt and llms-small.txt routes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix llms.txt plugin review findings

- Remove unused third parameter from entryToSimpleMarkdown() calls
- Include nested docs in sitemap expansion
- Skip non-markdown paths when appending .md extension
- Extract shared SidebarItem type to types.ts
- Consolidate reference path constants into REFERENCE_INDEX_PATHS
- Update terminology in CLAUDE.md ("hierarchical index" → "documentation map")
- Centralize non-markdown path configuration in redirects.mjs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Preserve base path in llms.txt plugin sitemap URLs

Replace site.origin with site.href.replace(/\/$/, "") to ensure
PR preview builds with --base "/pr-123/" generate correct URLs
that include the base path instead of pointing to the domain root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -79,16 +79,15 @@ Some content is auto-generated and excluded from linting:
   ```bash
   git update-index --skip-worktree src/content/docs/changelog/index.mdx
   ```
-- **Docs Map**: Run `bun run generate:docs-map` to create the documentation map.
-  Generated file: `public/sitemap.md`.
 - **Excalidraw Diagrams**: Run `bun run generate:excalidraw` to convert `.excalidraw`
   source files to SVG. In markdown, reference diagrams as `![alt](foo.excalidraw)`.
   The remark plugin inlines the corresponding `foo.excalidraw.svg` directly into
   HTML for CSS dark mode support. Generated SVGs are gitignored.
 - **LLM Documentation**: Enabled via `LLMS_TXT=true`. The local starlight-llms-txt
   plugin implements the [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org/) standard, generating
-  `/llms.txt`, `/llms-full.txt`, `/llms-small.txt`, custom sets at `/_llms-txt/*.txt`,
-  and per-page `.md` files. These outputs are for LLM consumption and not tracked in git.
+  `/llms.txt` (documentation map with page descriptions and headings),
+  `/llms-full.txt` (complete documentation bundle), and per-page `.md` files.
+  These outputs are for LLM consumption and not tracked in git.
 - **OCSF Reference**: Run `bun run generate:ocsf` for latest version or
   `bun run generate:ocsf:all` for all versions. Fetches schema from schema.ocsf.io
   and articles from ocsf/ocsf-docs. Generated files: `src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/`,

@@ -57,9 +57,6 @@ jobs:
         if: github.event_name != 'pull_request'
         run: bun run generate:ocsf:all
 
-      - name: Generate docs map
-        run: bun run generate:docs-map
-
       - name: Generate Excalidraw SVGs
         run: bun run generate:excalidraw

@@ -8,13 +8,12 @@
     "build": "astro build",
     "preview": "astro preview",
     "astro": "astro",
-    "generate": "bun run generate:changelog && bun run generate:claude-plugins && bun run generate:ocsf && bun run generate:docs-map && bun run generate:excalidraw",
+    "generate": "bun run generate:changelog && bun run generate:claude-plugins && bun run generate:ocsf && bun run generate:excalidraw",
     "generate:changelog": "node scripts/sync-changelog.mjs",
     "generate:claude-plugins": "node scripts/sync-claude-plugins.mjs",
     "generate:ocsf": "node scripts/sync-ocsf.mjs",
     "generate:ocsf:all": "node scripts/sync-ocsf.mjs --all",
-    "generate:docs-map": "node scripts/generate-docs.mjs --map",
-    "generate:docs-bundle": "node scripts/generate-docs.mjs --full",
+    "generate:docs-bundle": "node scripts/generate-docs.mjs",
     "generate:excalidraw": "node scripts/generate-excalidraw-svgs.mjs",
     "generate:excalidraw:placeholders": "node scripts/generate-placeholder-svgs.mjs",
     "sync:openapi": "bash scripts/sync-openapi.sh",
